patches.before_text: "Major Investor" means a holder of at least 1,000,000 shares of Series A Preferred Stock. "Requisite Holders" means Major Investors holding at least a majority of the outstanding Series A Preferred Stock, voting as a single class.
patches.after_text: "Major Investor" means a holder of at least 1,000,000 shares of Series A Preferred Stock. "Requisite Holders" means Major Investors holding at least a majority of the outstanding Series A Preferred Stock, voting as a single class.
patches.ground_span: "Major Investor" means a holder of at least 1,000,000 shares of Series A Preferred Stock. "Requisite Holders" means Major Investors holding at least a majority of the outstanding Series A Preferred Stock, voting as a single class.

plant_position.fallback_text: "Major Investor" means a holder of at least 1,000,000 shares of Series A Preferred Stock. "Requisite Holders" means Major Investors holding at least a majority of the outstanding Series A Preferred Stock, voting as a single class.

patches.before_text: No investor approval is required for matters not listed in this Section 4.
patches.after_text: Requisite Holder approval is required before approving annual budgets, hiring vice presidents, entering vendor contracts above $50,000, changing product roadmaps, signing customer arrangements, or administering routine financing matters.
patches.ground_span: Requisite Holder approval is required before approving annual budgets, hiring vice presidents, entering vendor contracts above $50,000, changing product roadmaps, signing customer arrangements, or administering routine financing matters.
patches.expected_redline_text: No investor approval is required for matters not listed in this Section 4.

plant_position.fallback_text: No investor approval is required for matters not listed in this Section 4.

patches.before_text: Except for the closed list in Section 4, management may conduct the Company's ordinary-course operations without investor consent, including budgets within board-approved limits, hiring, vendor contracts, product decisions, customer arrangements, and routine financing administration.
patches.after_text: Investor consent is required for the identified action because it appears on the Agreement's closed list of protective provisions. A consent request remains open for 3 days, and supporting board materials are circulated 2 days before the vote.
patches.ground_span: Investor consent is required for the identified action because it appears on the Agreement's closed list of protective provisions. A consent request remains open for 3 days, and supporting board materials are circulated 2 days before the vote.

plant_position.fallback_text: Except for the closed list in Section 4, management may conduct the Company's ordinary-course operations without investor consent, including budgets within board-approved limits, hiring, vendor contracts, product decisions, customer arrangements, and routine financing administration.

patches.after_text: Investor consent is required for every budget, hire, vendor contract, and ordinary-course product decision.
patches.ground_span: Investor consent is required for every budget, hire, vendor contract, and ordinary-course product decision.
patches.expected_redline_text: Company may conduct ordinary-course operations without investor consent, including budgets, hiring, vendor contracts, product decisions, and routine financing administration.

patches.before_text: These restrictions do not apply to a transfer to a Permitted Transferee, provided the recipient signs a joinder agreeing to be bound by this Agreement before the transfer is effective.
patches.after_text: A transfer to the identified affiliate is treated as a permitted transfer even though the recipient does not agree in writing to be bound. The transferor gives administrative notice within 10 days and delivers the executed joinder within 1 days after transfer.
patches.ground_span: A transfer to the identified affiliate is treated as a permitted transfer even though the recipient does not agree in writing to be bound. The transferor gives administrative notice within 10 days and delivers the executed joinder within 1 days after transfer.
patches.expected_redline_text: Transfer restrictions do not apply to permitted transfers to affiliates, estate planning vehicles, or family members if the recipient agrees in writing to be bound by this Agreement.

plant_position.fallback_text: These restrictions do not apply to a transfer to a Permitted Transferee, provided the recipient signs a joinder agreeing to be bound by this Agreement before the transfer is effective.

patches.before_text: Each holder receiving Company information will keep that information confidential, use it only to monitor its investment, and disclose it only to representatives bound by comparable confidentiality obligations.
patches.after_text: Each holder receiving Company information will keep that information confidential, use it only to monitor its investment, and disclose it only to representatives bound by comparable confidentiality obligations. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.
patches.ground_span: Each holder receiving Company information will keep that information confidential, use it only to monitor its investment, and disclose it only to representatives bound by comparable confidentiality obligations. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.

plant_position.fallback_text: Each holder receiving Company information will keep that information confidential, use it only to monitor its investment, and disclose it only to representatives bound by comparable confidentiality obligations.

patches.after_text: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: "Major Investor" means a holder of at least 100,000 shares of Series A Preferred Stock. "Requisite Holders" means any single Major Investor holding at least 10% of the outstanding Series A Preferred Stock.
patches.ground_span: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: "Major Investor" means a holder of at least 100,000 shares of Series A Preferred Stock. "Requisite Holders" means any single Major Investor holding at least 10% of the outstanding Series A Preferred Stock.

patches.after_text: The parties confirm that covered disputes will proceed through confidential arbitration.
patches.ground_span: The parties confirm that covered disputes will proceed through confidential arbitration.
